hero.description: Industrial kitchen equipment, custom manufacturing, installation, renovation, architectural support and worldwide delivery.
hero.description2: to turn your dream business into reality.
stats.title: Our Statistics
services.title: Your Complete Solution Partner
services.description: We are with you at every stage of restaurant setup.
services.s1desc: Stainless steel kitchen equipment, stoves, ovens, hoods and custom manufacturing solutions.
services.s2.title: Architectural Support
services.s2.text: Interior design, kitchen planning, ergonomic layout and aesthetic solutions.
services.s3.title: Custom Manufacturing
services.s3.text: Custom-sized and specially designed kitchen equipment manufacturing.
services.s4.title: Renovation & Construction
services.s4.text: Complete restaurant renovation, electrical, plumbing, flooring and wall works.
services.s5.title: Signage & Visual Design
services.s5.text: Illuminated signs, channel letters, digital printing, menu boards and corporate identity.
services.s6.title: 24/7 Technical Support
services.s6.text: Maintenance, repair, spare parts and remote support after installation.
shipping.title: Worldwide Delivery
shipping.description: Safe and fast logistics solutions to more than 50 countries. Door-to-door delivery including customs clearance and professional packaging.
process.title: How We Work?
process.subtitle: We turn your restaurant dream into reality in four steps.
process.step1.title: Free Site Inspection
process.step1.text: We inspect your location on-site, analyze your needs, take measurements and share initial ideas. This stage is completely free.
process.step2.title: Planning & Design
process.step2.text: 3D modeling, kitchen layout, ergonomic planning and cost analysis. Our architects and engineers prepare the complete project.
process.step3.title: Production & Installation
process.step3.text: Custom equipment manufacturing, renovation, electrical and plumbing works, signage installation. We coordinate the entire process.
process.step4.title: Delivery & Support
process.step4.text: Equipment testing, staff training, warranty documents and 24/7 technical support. We also provide logistics support for international deliveries.
about.title: Who is Tuncerdesign?
about.text1: Since 2009, Tuncerdesign has been a leading company in the industrial kitchen sector, providing complete solutions under one roof.
about.text2: We do more than sell equipment. From planning to opening your business, we stand by your side every step of the way. With custom manufacturing, an experienced technical team and a global logistics network, we deliver world-class service.
about.feature1.title: Quality Certificates
about.feature2.title: 2-Year Warranty
about.feature3.title: Fast Delivery
about.feature4.title: Competitive Price
cta.title: Ready to Build Your Dream Business?
cta.description: Start with our free consultation. Our expert team will visit your location and offer the most suitable solutions.
